title: The Midnight Visitor
hook: A mysterious figure visits a quiet town, stirring up old secrets and fears.
story: In the small coastal town of Willowbrook, something strange begins to happen. One night every month, a cloaked stranger appears at the abandoned lighthouse on the edge of town. As sightings become more frequent, locals start to experience eerie phenomena linked to the town's dark past. A young journalist arrives to uncover the truth behind these events and the identity of the visitor.
ending: As the sun rises on the day after the next visit, the mystery deepens rather than resolves. The journalist finds an old diary in the lighthouse that hints at a tragic love story from decades ago, suggesting the cloaked figure is an apparition tied to unresolved emotions and forgotten history.

scenes.description: A quiet town street with fog rolling in as night falls. A mysterious figure dressed entirely in black walks down the deserted road towards the old lighthouse, their face hidden by a dark hooded cloak.
scenes.visual_prompt: Nighttime coastal town setting with a cloaked figure walking under a full moon.

scenes.description: The interior of an old newspaper office. A young journalist named Lily is going through old files and newspapers from the past, looking for any mention of the lighthouse or mysterious visitors.
scenes.visual_prompt: An old newspaper office with boxes of papers and a curious young woman.

scenes.description: A rainy night scene at the abandoned lighthouse. The door creaks open to reveal a dark, fog-filled interior as lightning strikes outside.
scenes.visual_prompt: Abandoned lighthouse during a thunderstorm with lightning flashing through windows.

scenes.description: A crowded town square at night where townspeople gather around whispering and pointing towards the direction of the lighthouse, looking anxious and uneasy.
scenes.visual_prompt: Town square under moonlight with people gathered and staring in a particular direction.

scenes.description: Inside the dusty attic of the old lighthouse, Lily discovers an old diary hidden behind a loose floorboard. She sits on the wooden floor, reading about love, loss, and secrets from long ago.
scenes.visual_prompt: Old attic with antique furniture, books, and a young woman holding a journal.
